# tryai.tools

> Free browser-based AI tools. No sign-up, no data stored.

Built by Knowsee (https://knowsee.co.uk).

## Tools

### AI Content Detector
- URL: https://tryai.tools/ai-detector
- What it does: Detects AI-generated text from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and other LLMs. Runs 7 statistical heuristics client-side, then classifies each sentence server-side using Gemini Flash.
- Features: Sentence-level highlighting, confidence scores, detected patterns with explanations, detailed reasoning, PDF report export, markdown copy.
- Limitations: No detector is 100% accurate. Results are statistical estimates, not proof. Short texts (under 50 words) are not supported.
- Free tier: 1M characters per day, no account required.

## Policies

- Privacy policy: https://tryai.tools/privacy-policy
- Terms of service: https://tryai.tools/terms-of-service

## Technical

- Stack: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vercel
- AI model used: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (for detection analysis)
- Data handling: Text is sent to Gemini API for processing and not stored. Rate limit counters use Upstash Redis. Theme preference and scan count stored in browser localStorage only.

## Contact

hello@knowsee.co.uk
